allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Name:', d.get\('name'\)\); print\('Labels:', d.get\('labels'\)\); ft=d.get\('fine_tuning',{}\); print\('FT language:', ft.get\('language'\)\); print\('FT is_allowed_to_fine_tune:', ft.get\('is_allowed_to_fine_tune'\)\); print\('Available for tiers:', d.get\('available_for_tiers'\)\); print\('High_quality_base_model_ids:', d.get\('high_quality_base_model_ids'\)\)")
